pr.title: Merge replit-agent into main — 122 commits of agent work (history-rewritten, secret scrubbed)
pr.body:
Merges 122 commits from `replit-agent` into `main` to bring all in-progress Replit Agent work into the production branch ahead of audit.

**History note:** `replit-agent` was history-rewritten via `git filter-repo` to redact a leaked Anthropic API key (replaced with `***REDACTED***`). The leaked key has been rotated on Anthropic's side. Backup tag `pre-scrub-replit-agent-backup` retained locally in Replit workspace.

**Pre-merge state:**
- `main` at `e420ce5` (PR #1 merge — production hardening pass)
- `replit-agent` at `544e22e` (rewritten head)
- 0 conflicts, fast-mergeable

**Scope of changes:** Stripe integration updates, AI runtime layer, document validation, seat limits, error handling, sign-in UI, QA prep, observability, QuickBooks integration.
pr.author: lifecoacher
